 * Canvas State Machine
 *
 * Central state management for the MMS Canvas using @zazcart/tools.
 * Uses useSyncExternalStore for React integration without stale closure issues.
 *
 * Slices:
 * - viewport: Camera position, momentum, animation, panning
 * - interaction: Hover and selection state for tasks
 *
 * @see TECH-DEBT-001
 * @see F018 - Hover highlight
 * @see F019 - Click to select
 */

import { createMachine } from '@zazcart/tools';
import { viewportSlice } from './viewport';
import { interactionSlice } from './interaction';

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// CANVAS MACHINE
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const canvasMachine = createMachine({
  id: 'canvas',
  slices: {
    viewport: viewportSlice,
    interaction: interactionSlice,
  },
  context: {
    userID: null,  // Canvas is public/anonymous, no user context needed
  },
  // Disable metadata tracking for high-frequency state updates (60fps)
  // This prevents GC thrashing from object allocations on every dispatch
  metadata: false,
});

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// EXPORTS
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

// Typed hooks for React components
export const useCanvas = canvasMachine.useMachine;
export const useCanvasSelector = canvasMachine.useSelector;

// Actions for dispatching state changes
export const canvasActions = canvasMachine.actions;

// Direct store access for animation loops (no React re-render)
export const canvasStore = {
  getState: canvasMachine.getState,
  dispatch: canvasMachine.dispatch,
  subscribe: canvasMachine.subscribe,
};

// Re-export types
export type { ViewportSliceState, CameraPosition, MomentumState, AnimationState, CanvasSize } from './viewport';
export type { InteractionSliceState } from './interaction';

import { createSyncSlice } from '@zazcart/tools';
import type { LODLevel } from '../data/types';

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// STATE TYPES
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export interface CameraPosition {
  x: number;
  y: number;
}

export interface MomentumState {
  velocityX: number;
  velocityY: number;
  isActive: boolean;
}

export interface AnimationState {
  isAnimating: boolean;
  startTime: number;
  duration: number;
  startX: number;
  startY: number;
  startZoom: number;
  targetX: number;
  targetY: number;
  targetZoom: number;
}

export interface CanvasSize {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

  // Camera position in world coordinates
  camera: CameraPosition;

  // Canvas dimensions (from R3F)
  canvasSize: CanvasSize;

  // Initialization flag
  isInitialized: boolean;

  // Momentum for inertial panning
  momentum: MomentumState;

  // Smooth animation state
  animation: AnimationState;

  // Interaction state
  isPanning: boolean;
  panStart: CameraPosition;
  cameraPosAtPanStart: CameraPosition;
}

// INITIAL STATE

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// VIEWPORT SLICE
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

export const viewportSlice = createSyncSlice({
  id: 'viewport',
  initial: initialState,
  cache: { policy: 'session' },  // Session-scoped: resets when app closes
  reducers: {
    // Camera position
    setCamera(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: CameraPosition) {
      state.camera = payload;
    },

    setCameraX(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: number) {
      state.camera.x = payload;
    },

    setCameraY(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: number) {
      state.camera.y = payload;
    },

    // Canvas size
    setCanvasSize(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: CanvasSize) {
      state.canvasSize = payload;
    },

    // Initialization
    initialize(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: { camera: CameraPosition; canvasSize: CanvasSize }
    ) {
      state.camera = payload.camera;
      state.canvasSize = payload.canvasSize;
      state.isInitialized = true;
    },

    // Momentum
    setMomentum(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: MomentumState) {
      state.momentum = payload;
    },

    startMomentum(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: { velocityX: number; velocityY: number }
    ) {
      state.momentum = {
        velocityX: payload.velocityX,
        velocityY: payload.velocityY,
        isActive: true,
      };
    },

    updateMomentum(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: { velocityX: number; velocityY: number; camera: CameraPosition }
    ) {
      state.momentum.velocityX = payload.velocityX;
      state.momentum.velocityY = payload.velocityY;
      state.camera = payload.camera;
    },

    stopMomentum(state: ViewportSliceState) {
      state.momentum = {
        velocityX: 0,
        velocityY: 0,
        isActive: false,
      };
    },

    // Animation
    startAnimation(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: {
        startX: number;
        startY: number;
        startZoom: number;
        targetX: number;
        targetY: number;
        targetZoom: number;
        duration?: number;
      }
    ) {
      state.animation = {
        isAnimating: true,
        startTime: Date.now(),
        duration: payload.duration ?? 250,
        startX: payload.startX,
        startY: payload.startY,
        startZoom: payload.startZoom,
        targetX: payload.targetX,
        targetY: payload.targetY,
        targetZoom: payload.targetZoom,
      };
    },

    updateAnimation(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: { camera: CameraPosition }
    ) {
      state.camera = payload.camera;
    },

    stopAnimation(state: ViewportSliceState) {
      state.animation.isAnimating = false;
    },

    // Panning
    startPan(
      state: ViewportSliceState,
      payload: { panStart: CameraPosition; cameraPosAtPanStart: CameraPosition }
    ) {
      state.isPanning = true;
      state.panStart = payload.panStart;
      state.cameraPosAtPanStart = payload.cameraPosAtPanStart;
    },

    updatePan(state: ViewportSliceState, payload: { camera: CameraPosition }) {
      state.camera = payload.camera;
    },

    endPan(state: ViewportSliceState) {
      state.isPanning = false;
    },

    // Reset
    reset() {
      return initialState;
    },
  },
});

export type ViewportSlice = typeof viewportSlice;
